title: VaultarHUD
description: For Vault Hunters 3rd Edition: Adds a HUD that shows the currently required items for your Vault Altar
body:
![VaultarHUD logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b65cda21839f5e51eb67ac32f92a8cdf4db618af.png)

_Requires Vault Hunters 3rd Edition!_

Adds a HUD opposite the bounty table HUD (when you press `Tab`) that shows a similar progress bar for items towards your current vault crystal. Required items that have variants (e.g. `Oak logs`, `Birch logs`) will cycle through the options automatically.

 

**Installation / Usage:**

*   Drop the jar file into your  `mods` folder
*   In game, press `Tab` to show the HUD. The HUD will also show up automatically in any inventory screens. Pressing `0` will toggle the HUD on/off.

 

**Notes:**

This mod can be installed either on the client only, or on both the client and server with a few caveats:

*   If it is installed on the client only, you will need to first track an altar by getting within 10 blocks of it, and then it will remain tracked while you are within its render distance (~5 chunks?). You can also manually right-click another altar to track that one instead. 
*   If it is installed on both the client and the server, then the HUD will update automatically and be live-tracked to you regardless of where you are. 

 

**Keybinds:**

Key bindings can be reconfigured from the standard in-game menu. 

 

**Configuration:**

Chose whether the HUD shows up within inventories, or just when the `Tab` key is held in-game. Also choose which type of inventory HUD (regular or small) is shown. Requires either editing the `vaultarhud-client.toml` config file, or using an in-game config mod such as Configured.
